rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM JOHNSON VS. AC AND S,INC.; et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 8, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANT INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE AFFIDAVIT REQUIREMENT OF CCP SECTION 1008(b). SEE KEARNS V. CSE INS. GROUP (2003) 106 CAL.APP.4TH 368, 382-83. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ALTHOUGH THE COURT AGREES THAT DEFENDANT IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR REPLACEMENT PARTS, ISSUES 1 AND 2 DO NOT RESOLVE A CAUSE OF ACTION AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 437c(f)(1). AS TO ISSUES 3 AND 4, DEFENDANT HAS NOT CITED TO A VERIFIED SPECIAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSE AND SO DID NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR WEBB VS. UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike Tentative Ruling Susatined Without Leave To Amend Demurrer

rulings.Case Title: BANK SAL. OPPENHEIM JR & CIE (SCHWEIZ) AG VS. PLANTAGENET CAPITAL FUND, L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 8, 2008, line 6, DEFENDANTS PLANTAGENET CAPITAL FUND, L.P., PLANTAGENET CAPITAL FUND II, L.P., PLANTAGENET CAPITAL PARTNERS, L.P., PLANTAGENET CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC, C ANDERSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE ISSUE OF WHETHER THE CLAIMS ARE SUBJECT TO AN ENFORCEABLE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE MAY NOT BE RAISED BY DEMURRER; RATHER, THE ISSUE MUST BE RAISED BY A MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. =(302/PJM/JW)
